description: Add a task-type classifier as a third routing dimension in hex inference routing, running before the complexity scorer. Uncommitted `hex-nexus/src/task_type_classifier.rs` exists and must be folded in with tests, then wired into `quant_router.rs` + `inference.rs` per the revised routing algorithm.

phases.description: The classifier module exists uncommitted. Review for API shape, add unit tests covering each TaskType variant (ShellCommand, FileTransform, Reasoning, PreciseSyntax, General), then commit.
phases.name: Fold in existing classifier + land tests

tasks.description: Read hex-nexus/src/task_type_classifier.rs. Ensure it exposes `TaskType` enum, `TaskTier` enum (or reuses existing), and `classify(prompt: &str) -> Option<(TaskType, TaskTier)>`. Add at least 12 unit tests covering positive + negative cases for each variant including ADR-listed keyword examples (run, execute, ssh, ollama, systemctl, etc.). Register the module in hex-nexus/src/lib.rs.
tasks.name: Review + test classifier

phases.description: Insert the task-type check before complexity scoring. Ensure current_tier monotonically rises per the revised algorithm (classifier floor, then complexity scorer, take max).

gate.command: cargo test -p hex-nexus quant_router && cargo test -p hex-nexus routes::inference

phases.name: Wire into quant_router + inference

tasks.description: In `select_provider`, call `TaskTypeClassifier::classify(prompt)` first. If it returns Some((_, tier)) with tier > current, raise current_tier. Then run existing complexity scoring and take max. Add routing decision to the span log.
tasks.name: quant_router pre-check

tasks.description: In hex-nexus/src/routes/inference.rs::inference_complete, apply the same classifier override before score_complexity. Log classifier verdict in the structured trace for escalation-report consumption.
tasks.name: inference_complete override

phases.description: Regression-proof the original motivating case: `run nvidia-smi on bazzite` is short, but must route to T2.5.
phases.name: Integration test — short-prompt shell command

tasks.description: Create tests/routing_integration.rs with cases: (a) short shell command => T2.5, (b) short 'add a comment' => T1, (c) 'debug why X fails' => T2.5, (d) long generic prose => complexity-scorer-governed.
tasks.name: Integration test
